allies.rationale_text: Butterfly-effect gives chaos-theory a concrete way to reason about sensitive dependence and nonlinear propagation through a system.
allies.source_quote: The literal term 'Butterfly Effect' is most closely associated with Chaos Theory and sensitive dependence on initial conditions.

allies.rationale_text: Risk-vs-uncertainty helps chaos-theory distinguish where precise forecasting breaks down and the real task becomes managing uncertainty honestly.
allies.source_quote: Its true utility lies in highlighting uncertainty and the difficulty of prediction in complex systems.

antagonists.rationale_text: False-precision-avoidance is the guardrail that chaos-theory calls for, and chaotic conditions make fake precision especially dangerous.
antagonists.source_quote: Complex systems can be so intricate that it is too challenging to simultaneously hold all interlocking pieces in one's head.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Chaos-theory conflicts with algorithmic-thinking when algorithmic thinking emphasizes predictability and structured problem-solving, contrasting with chaos theory's focus on unpredictability and non-linearity.
structured_tensions.source_quote: chaos-theory conflicts with algorithmic-thinking (algorithmic thinking) when algorithmic Thinking emphasizes predictability and structured problem-solving, contrasting with Chaos Theory's focus on unpredictability and non-linearity.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Chaos-theory conflicts with optimization-theory when the tension between finding the best solution within constraints and accepting inherent unpredictability causes optimization assumptions to obscure nonlinear system behavior.
structured_tensions.source_quote: chaos-theory conflicts with optimization-theory (optimization theory) when the tension between finding the best solution within constraints and accepting inherent unpredictability causes optimization assumptions to obscure nonlinear system behavior.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the relation surface narrow around nonlinear sensitivity, uncertainty discipline, and anti-false-precision pressure.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader catastrophe and economics sprawl beyond the clearest current-vocabulary seams.
open_questions: A fuller chaos neighborhood may become available later, but the current first-order surface is cleanest through butterfly-effect and uncertainty discipline.
